info.title: SAM CLI REST API
info.description: Generated contract for the REST API surface consumed by the SAM Go CLI.

post.summary: Exchange a SAM API token for a session cookie.
Create a device authorization code for CLI login.
Poll a device authorization code for a session cookie.

get.summary: List projects visible to the authenticated user.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of projects to return.

get.summary: List chat sessions for a project.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sessions to return.

get.summary: Get a chat session with messages.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return.

post.summary: Submit a task for agent execution.

get.summary: List project tasks. The CLI currently uses status=draft for ideas.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tasks to return.

get.summary: List files in the project library.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of files to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of entities to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of notifications to return.

get.summary: List project and builtin agent profiles.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return.

get.summary: List infrastructure nodes for the authenticated user.
List detected ports for a workspace.
Create an access token and URL for a workspace port.
